results.evidence: Module at src/sync/github-rate-limit-budget.ts with BudgetState interface, reads/writes .specweave/state/github-rate-limit.json
GitHubClientV2.execWithBudget() wraps all gh CLI calls via checkAndDecrement(), returns early with warning when budget < 200
decrementBudget() does atomic read-modify-write, Math.max(0, ...) prevents underflow. Tests: TC-003, TC-005
needsValidation() checks callsSinceValidation >= 50 OR elapsed >= 5min. validateBudget() calls gh api rate_limit. Tests: TC-004
reconciler-lock.ts writes {pid, startedAt} JSON to .specweave/state/reconciler.lock. Test: TC-006
acquireLock() returns false when isStale() is false (fresh lock, PID running). Test: TC-007
isStale() checks age >= 5min OR !isPidRunning(pid). acquireLock() overwrites stale locks. Tests: TC-008, dead-PID test
label-cache.ts saveToDisk() writes to .specweave/state/github-label-cache.json via setLabelCacheDir()
loadFromDisk() runs on first ensureLabels() call, loads from disk file, skips entries > 24h. Test: TC-009
saveToDisk() called after created=true flag when new labels are added. Test: TC-010
github-feature-sync.ts:313-324 calls getIssueNumberFromMetadata(), skips DuplicateDetector.createWithProtection() if found. Test: TC-011
editIssueBody() at github-client-v2.ts:572 does direct gh issue edit without getIssue() pre-fetch. Used at github-feature-sync.ts:320. Test: TC-012
